Each layer of the encoder uses a self-attention mechanism allowing the model to weigh the significance of different words in the input sentence when making predictions. In contrast, its larger variant, BERT large, contains 24 transformer layers and utilizes more parameters to achieve higher performance.\\n\\n### 3.
